fields.explainEn: Used size.
Time when the data file was created.
Data file path.
Status of the file. Options are ONLINE, OFFLINE, and RECOVER.

fields.explainZh: 描述SQL对文件的访问方式: DISABLED READ ONLY和READ WRITE。
fields.explainEn: SQL-based file access method. Options are DISABLED READ ONLY and READ WRITE.
File size.
Free size.
Last update time.
Autoextend size.
Tablespace to which the data file belongs.
File usage.

fields.explainZh: 会话处于阻塞状态的锁的数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of locks with sessions in blocked state.
Archive status. Options are YES and NO.

fields.explainZh: 数据库的启动的状态: READ ONLY或READ WRITE。
fields.explainEn: Status of the database. Options are READ ONLY and READ WRITE.

fields.explainZh: 实例所运行的主机名, 单用户模式下该字段无效。
fields.explainEn: Name of the host running the instance. This field is invalid in single user mode.
Name of the instance.

fields.explainZh: 用于实例注册的实例号。
fields.explainEn: Instance number used for registration.
Status of instance startup. Options are STARTED, MOUNTED, and OPENED.

fields.explainZh: 实例所运行的数据库版本。
fields.explainEn: Version of the database.

fields.explainZh: 是否允许多用户访问，ALLOWED或RESTRICTED。
fields.explainEn: Whether to allow multiple users to log in. Options are ALLOWED and RESTRICTED.

fields.explainZh: 当前实例是否以并行模式运行，YES或NO。
fields.explainEn: Whether the current instance is running in parallel mode. Options are YES and NO.

fields.explainZh: 上一次的数据库状态的启动的状态：READ ONLY或READ WRITE。
fields.explainEn: Previous status of the database. Options are READ ONLY and READ WRITE.

fields.explainZh: 实例所在主机的当前时间与实例启动时间差值。
fields.explainEn: Difference between the current time of the host running the instance and the startup time of the instance.
Startup mode of the instance. Options are CMD and SERVICE.
Startup time of the instance.
Address of Lock Objet.

fields.explainZh: 0或者1，取决于锁是否是阻塞者。
fields.explainEn: Whether the lock is blocking other processes. Options are 0 (not blocking) and 1 (blocking).
Address of Lock.

fields.nameEn: Time The Lock Has Been Held
fields.explainEn: Time since current mode was granted.

fields.explainZh: 会话持有锁的锁模式：none、null、共享表锁、独占行锁、共享锁、共享行锁和独占锁。
fields.explainEn: Lock mode in which the session holds the lock. Options are none, null, Shared table lock, Exclusive row lock, Share, Shared row lock, and Exclusive lock.
Type of the user or system lock.

fields.explainZh: 请求的锁的锁模式：none、null、共享表锁、独占行锁、共享锁、共享行锁和独占锁。
fields.explainEn: Lock mode in which the process requests the lock. Options are none, null, Shared table lock, Exclusive row lock, Share, Shared row lock, and Exclusive lock.

fields.explainZh: 持有或请求锁的会话的标识。
fields.explainEn: ID of the session holding or acquiring the lock.
Transaction ID.
Time when the log file was created.
Initial size of the log file.
Status of the log file. Options are on line and off line.
Number of the log file.
Path of the log file.
Type of the log file, which is ONLINE.
Maximum allowed size of the log file.

fields.nameZh: 自动增长(大小或百分比)
fields.explainZh: 如果‘是否按照百分比增长’为false,表示自动增长大小(byte)。如果‘是否按照百分比增长’为true, 表示自动增长百分比。
fields.explainEn: The value is increased bytes if the value for Autoextend in Percentage is false. The value is increased percentage if the value for Autoextend in Percentage true.
Actual size of the log file.
Whether the file size is increased in percentage.
Previous file type.
Usage of the log file.
Number of threads of the BACKGROUND type.
Number of threads for the application.
Number of threads of the USER type.

fields.explainZh: 活跃会话数占总会话数的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of sessions in ACTIVE state to total sessions.
Number sessions in ACTIVE state.
Total number of sessions.
Number sessions in INACTIVEKILLED state.
Number sessions in SNIPED state.
Number of BACKGROUND sessions.
Number of USER sessions.
Number of files in the tablespace.
Free tablespace size.
Total tablespace size.
Tablespace name.

fields.explainZh: 已用空间占总大小的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of the used size to the total size of the tablespace.
Used tablespace size.
Number of current user sessions.
The session state of current user.
Username using session.
UUID.

fields.explainZh: 实例所运行的数据库版本。
fields.explainEn: Version of the application.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
